name: Hawaii DCCA PVL Contractor License Search

agency.name: Hawaii Department of Commerce and Consumer Affairs Professional and Vocational Licensing

updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official PVL license search before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Hawaii A general engineering contractor licenses
Hawaii B general building contractor licenses
Hawaii C specialty contractor licenses and subclassifications exposed by DCCA PVL public license search
knownExclusions: This source entry is scoped to professional and vocational licensing records and does not represent every business registration, local permit, or tax record in Hawaii.
Business Check and complaint-history resources are separate public tools and are not modeled as normalized license records in this entry.
County permits, business registrations, complaint history, and separately licensed individual electricians or plumbers are outside this contractor-source entry.
The official classification document describes contractor scope, but the public search shape and contractor-to-responsible-managing-employee relationships still require adapter review.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Do not bypass portal controls; prefer official export options if discovered.
publicRecordsNotes: Official DCCA PVL lookup metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license, business registration, or local authorization does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: DCCA's hire-a-licensed-contractor page publishes a dated PDF list of licensed contractors and PVL offers list-purchase services. No stable machine-readable contractor export, schema, publication policy, or automated snapshot resolver has been reviewed.
researchNotes: The Contractors License Board publishes A general engineering, B general building, and C specialty classifications covering every tracked statewide trade domain. Adapter work remains blocked until an official machine-readable file or a stable, permitted lookup contract is reviewed.
verificationCaveats: Classification coverage does not replace checking the current license status, responsible managing employee, project scope, county permit, or separately required individual trade credential.
No matching record means no match in the checked DCCA source at that time, not proof that no license or authorization exists.
verificationNotes: No supported sync or verification adapter is exposed while the public search and dated PDF list remain unreviewed for stable machine access.
maintainerNotes: Keep DCCA contractor licensing separate from individual electrician/plumber licenses, business registration, complaint history, and county permits.

researchEvidence.note: Official public source, access shape, and current automation constraints reviewed.
Official board classification document reviewed; it defines A general engineering, B general building, and C specialty classifications across all tracked contractor trade domains.
Official consumer page reviewed; it links the public license search and a dated list of licensed contractors while emphasizing current-license verification.

blocker.summary: No stable, documented machine-readable official interface is currently suitable for an offline-tested adapter.
